name: Aranalda
bio:
Physical Appearance: Altmer (High Elf) Female vampire wearing a lower-class robe. Displays the physical traits associated with vampirism.

Race: [Unknown; identifiable only through recovered notes]

Personality Keywords: devoted, corrupted

Role: Vampire and former worshipper of Azura; member of the Afflicted Brethren in Gutted Mine.

Home Location Information: Resides within Gutted Mine alongside the other members of the Afflicted Brethren.

Equipment and Abilities: Functions as the group’s ranged combatant. Armed with a bow and short blade and carries a supply of arrows. May also possess a magical staff. Uses arcane spells consistent with witchhunter training, selecting the strongest spells available to her skill.

Personality – Afflicted Worshipper: Aranalda was once a follower of Azura and became afflicted with vampirism after taking part in the slaying of a powerful vampire named Dratik. She remains with the other Afflicted Brethren within Gutted Mine, bound together by their shared origin and condition. One member of the group carries a worn note that records the identities of the Brethren, allowing individuals such as Aranalda to be distinguished.

Fate: Aranalda is one of the Afflicted Brethren whom Azura seeks to have released from their curse during her intervention at Gutted Mine.
author: Bethesda
